# Unsaathi

> Your ally for a simpler divorce process in Delhi NCR.

Unsaathi is a legal service specializing in divorce and related family law matters in the Delhi NCR region (Delhi, Noida, Gurgaon). They offer expert legal assistance for both mutual and contested divorces, with transparent pricing starting from ₹20,000. The service aims to simplify the often complex and emotionally taxing divorce process for individuals seeking legal resolution.

Their core value proposition lies in providing accessible, affordable, and expert legal guidance. Use cases include individuals initiating divorce proceedings, seeking clarity on conjugal rights, dealing with maintenance and alimony, or navigating issues like dowry, cruelty, child custody, and visitation. Unsaathi positions itself as a supportive partner, helping clients achieve a smoother and more efficient legal outcome during a difficult life transition. They emphasize a free initial consultation to understand client needs and provide tailored legal strategies.

## Core Services

- [Unsaathi - Best Divorce Lawyers in Delhi NCR](https://www.unsaathi.com/): Find expert divorce lawyers in Delhi NCR for mutual and contested divorces, starting at ₹20k.
- [Services](https://www.unsaathi.com/services): Overview of all divorce and family law services offered by Unsaathi.
- [Mutual Divorce](https://www.unsaathi.com/services/mutual-divorce): Learn about the process and requirements for a mutual consent divorce.
- [Contested Divorce](https://www.unsaathi.com/services/contested-divorce): Understand the legal steps involved in a contested divorce proceeding.
- [Conjugal Rights](https://www.unsaathi.com/services/conjugal-rights): Information on legal rights and remedies related to conjugal relationships.
- [Maintenance and Alimony](https://www.unsaathi.com/services/maintenance-and-alimony): Details on legal provisions for maintenance and alimony in divorce cases.
- [Dowry](https://www.unsaathi.com/services/dowry): Legal information and recourse concerning dowry-related issues.
- [Cruelty](https://www.unsaathi.com/services/cruelty): Understand legal definitions and implications of cruelty in marriage.
- [Child Custody](https://www.unsaathi.com/services/child-custody): Learn about legal aspects and procedures for child custody disputes.
- [Child Visitation](https://www.unsaathi.com/services/child-visitation): Information on legal rights and arrangements for child visitation.
- [Judicial Separation](https://www.unsaathi.com/services/judicial-separation): Explore the legal process and consequences of judicial separation.
- [Annulment of Marriage](https://www.unsaathi.com/services/annulment-of-marriage): Understand the grounds and process for annulling a marriage.
